Business Objective: Direct copy/paste editing of emails and messages for clear grammar and intent.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define audience and examples.Project Files: Text needing editing.
Enabling AI Technologies: LLM core prose generation, text-to-text style transfer.
Platform Feature Gaps: ⚠️ No inline integration into MS Outlook or Word.
Strategic Workaround: Build a custom Office Add-in or train users on clipboard manager shortcuts.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Handled via the standalone Gemini Enterprise web app. Users copy/paste drafts for secure refinement.

Business Objective: Guarding tone and brand identity when adding new copy to digital products and sites.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define audience, brand voice and examples.Project Files: Text needing editing.
Platform Feature Gaps: ⚠️ Shared Gems are "read-only." Teams cannot collaboratively edit.
Strategic Workaround: Establish a "Prompt Library" on Enterprise SharePoint for master instructions.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Users create custom Gems within the Gemini web app, hardcoding brand guidelines.

Business Objective: Ingesting massive, dense PDFs or manuals for rapid extraction and core themes.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define audience, output format, and citation requirements.Project Files: Dense PDFs/Manuals.
Primary Access Interface: Standalone Gemini web app leveraging 1M+ token context.
Strategic Workaround: Split massive PDFs into chapters. Prompt Gemini to generate TOC first.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Users directly upload local files (PDFs, Word) into the Gemini web app, leveraging the 1M+ token context window.

Business Objective: Consolidating meeting minutes to build consecutive agendas, action logs, and deliverables.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Give context about the project and your role.Project Files: Meeting transcripts.
Primary Access Interface: Standalone Gemini web app for manual uploads.
Enabling AI Technologies: Structured text parsing, sequence logic extraction.
Platform Feature Gaps: ⚠️ No native hook into MS Teams/Zoom cloud storage.
Strategic Workaround: Low-code MS Power Automate flow to auto-save transcripts to OneDrive.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Users upload meeting transcripts (from Teams/Zoom) into the Gemini web app to generate structured outputs.

Business Objective: Creating and optimizing digital ad copy, social media posts, and SEO keywords.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Give background on campaign, audience, and goal.Project Files: Source text for new campaign.
Primary Access Interface: Custom Gems tailored for specific social channels.
Platform Feature Gaps: ⚠️ Cannot connect to live SEO platforms (e.g., SEMrush).
Strategic Workaround: Hypothesis generation via Gemini, manual validation via SEMrush.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Marketing teams use custom Gems in the Gemini app tailored for specific social media channels.

Business Objective: Screening resumes, drafting job descriptions, and creating performance reviews.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define role requirements and HR constraints.Project Files: Anonymized resumes / performance data.
Primary Access Interface: Standalone Gemini web app for cross-referencing.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 10-file upload limit.⚠️ Parser misreads heavy designs.
Strategic Workaround: Process in batches of 10. Require plain-text or ATS exports.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: HR securely uploads anonymized candidate resumes to the Gemini web app to cross-reference against requirements.

Business Objective: Automating expense submission summaries and basic financial reporting.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define forecasting metrics and budget parameters.Project Files: CSV/Excel financial exports.
Primary Access Interface: Standalone Gemini web app for table generation.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 No interactive mobile charts.🐛 Nested spreadsheet failures.
Strategic Workaround: Enforce desktop-only usage. Flatten Excel data to simple CSV before upload.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Users upload local CSV or Excel exports into the Gemini web app to generate categorized summary tables.

Business Objective: Curating self-service project hubs for new hires to query interactively.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define target audience (e.g., technical vs. business user).Project Files: Reference manuals, SOPs.
Enabling AI Technologies: Multi-file RAG indexing, read-only permission provisioning.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 NotebookLM limited to 100 sources.⚠️ Notebooks cannot cross-search.
Strategic Workaround: Decentralize into department-specific notebooks linked via SharePoint.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: HR uploads local onboarding manuals into a dedicated NotebookLM workspace to create a secure Q&A hub.

Business Objective: Adapting existing campaign text and iteratively modifying visuals for new audiences.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Give background on campaign, audience, and localization goal.Project Files: Text/Assets for new campaign.
Enabling AI Technologies: Multimodal LLMs, Generative Image AI (diffusion models).
Platform Feature Gaps: ⚠️ Complex multi-vector billing model in Agent Studio.
Strategic Workaround: Implement strict quota limits. Run a 30-day fixed-budget pilot.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Alternative Right Approach: Text via Gemini app (No Code). For enterprise asset design pipelines, use Agent Studio.

Business Objective: Collaborative team spaces to define vision, mission, and product strategies.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define product requirements and user stories.Project Files: Market research, feature requests.
Platform Feature Gaps: ⚠️ No out-of-the-box collaborative canvas without Workspace.
Strategic Workaround: Ideate on MS Whiteboard. Export raw notes to NotebookLM for synthesis.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Alternative Right Approach: Teams collaboratively query a shared knowledge base in NotebookLM, or build a discovery portal via Agent Studio.

Business Objective: Assisting technical teams with script debugging, code optimization, and test automation.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define language, lifecycle stage, and error context.Project Files: Code snippets, test logic.
Primary Access Interface: Gemini Code Assist embedded in IDEs (VS Code/IntelliJ).
Enabling AI Technologies: Code LLMs, syntax interpreters, repository analysis.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 Output window capped at ~65k tokens.🐛 Occasional IDE crashes.
Strategic Workaround: Train engineers on "Iterative Prompting". Allocate more memory to IDEs.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Gemini Code Assist embeds directly into developers' IDEs (VS Code, IntelliJ) or Cloud Workstations.

Business Objective: Drafting grant proposals and analyzing project portfolios to recommend priorities.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define portfolio criteria and strategic priorities.Project Files: Past grants, literature.
Primary Access Interface: Standalone Gemini web app or NotebookLM.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 Document limits (10 files web app, 100 files NotebookLM).
Strategic Workaround: Curate a "Gold Standard" repository of the top 20-50 successful grants.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Researchers upload past grants into the Gemini web app or NotebookLM to synthesize new proposals securely.

Business Objective: Automating multi-step processes across different applications (e.g., SAP, Jira, ServiceNow).
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define trigger events and multi-step routing logic.Project Files: API documentation, workflow maps.
Primary Access Interface: Custom workflow agents via Agent Studio.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 Lacks native triggers for legacy on-premise ERPs like SAP.
Strategic Workaround: Use an iPaaS (like MuleSoft) as a bridge to translate legacy APIs.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Alternative Right Approach: Requires building custom workflow agents using Agent Studio's visual builder to connect to Enterprise APIs.

Business Objective: Cross-paper evaluation, domain classification, and structured data retention.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define extraction entities and trends to identify.Project Files: Patents, scientific literature.
Primary Access Interface: Pipeline in Agent Studio linked to Vector DBs.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 AI struggles with complex scientific charts.
Strategic Workaround: HITL review for charts. Build parsing pipeline using Google Document AI.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Alternative Right Approach: Use NotebookLM for small batches. For scaling across thousands of papers, build an agent in Agent Studio linked to corporate Vector DBs.

Business Objective: Comparing shifting external regulations directly against internal SOPs to flag gaps.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define comparison matrix and compliance gaps.Project Files: Contracts, policies, external regulations.
Enabling AI Technologies: Web Search APIs, multi-agent evaluation frameworks.
Platform Feature Gaps: ⚠️ Google's Agent Gateway is in preview (not ready for high-risk autonomous use).
Strategic Workaround: Design as "Co-Pilot" (advisory) only. Do not auto-update SOPs without human approval.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Alternative Right Approach: Build an agent via Agent Studio utilizing Search Grounding, protected by Model Armor and custom API endpoints.

Business Objective: Identifying key clauses, risks, and obligations in massive legal contracts.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define risk flags and key clauses to extract.Project Files: Legal contracts.
Primary Access Interface: Specialized legal pipeline integrating Document AI.
Enabling AI Technologies: Legal domain adaptation, precise entity extraction.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 Standard RAG destroys the hierarchical structure of legal contracts.
Strategic Workaround: High-code pipeline using Custom Document Extractor to preserve contract hierarchy.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Alternative Right Approach: Build a specialized legal pipeline requiring custom Document AI parsing models integrated with Agent Runtime.

Business Objective: Synthesizing Exploratory Data Analysis and building predictive operational models.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Define target variable and visualization output.Project Files: Raw datasets for EDA.
Primary Access Interface: Custom data agents natively in BigQuery / ADK.
Platform Feature Gaps: 🚫 Building data agents natively locks the application into GCP infrastructure.
Strategic Workaround: Abstract orchestration layer. Write core logic in LangChain, use GCP for compute.

Business Objective: System-wide test ping to verify intent classification accuracy and latency bounds across all active spoke channels.
Scoping & Prompting Inputs: Project Prompt: Latency limits and active spokes.Project Files: System config logs.
Strategic Workaround: Redirect ping records to Cloud Logging stream.
Gemini Enterprise Approach: Fully Native: Run diagnostic check queries through the ADK coordinator agent.
